subgoals.description: Research and compile a list of suitable Edinburgh venues with key details such as location, capacity, price range, and amenities.
subgoals.success_criterion: List of 3-5 venues with all required details gathered

subgoals.description: Draft a promotional flyer using the selected venue's details, highlighting key features and contact information.
subgoals.success_criterion: Flyer text is complete with all necessary elements and ready for design
